title: SQL Full Course - Build a Database and Deploy It
summary: An AWS tutorial video covering foundational SQL concepts, database design, and hands-on deployment to the cloud. Covers CRUD operations, normalization, relationships, JOINs, and deploying MySQL databases to Amazon RDS.
